title: Complete organization setup and reach the dashboard
description: A new user can complete onboarding by entering an organization name and currency and then reach the main dashboard.

steps.description: Fill in the login field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Fill in the dealership name field with a valid organization name
Verify the main dashboard is displayed

title: Switch the dashboard language to Arabic RTL
description: A user can switch the dashboard interface to Arabic and see the layout change to right-to-left.

steps.description: Click the language toggle in the sidebar
Verify the interface switches to Arabic

title: Keep onboarding progress while moving between setup steps
description: A new user can move from organization name entry to currency selection and complete the wizard without losing progress.

steps.description: Fill in the login field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Fill in the dealership name field with a valid organization name
Verify the onboarding completion screen is displayed

title: Switch the dashboard language back to English LTR
description: A user can switch the dashboard interface back to English and restore the left-to-right layout.

steps.description: Click the language toggle in the sidebar
Click the language toggle in the sidebar again
Verify the interface switches back to English
Verify the layout returns to left-to-right

title: Add a vehicle with VIN auto-fill
description: An inventory user can create a vehicle by decoding a VIN, completing the remaining details, and seeing the new vehicle in the list.

steps.description: Fill in the login field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Fill in a valid VIN into the VIN field
Fill in the remaining required vehicle details
Verify the new vehicle appears in the inventory list

title: Search vehicles in inventory
description: A user can search the inventory and see matching vehicle results.

steps.description: Fill in the login field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Fill in the vehicle search field with a known vehicle term
Verify matching vehicle results are displayed

title: Record a cash sale from the sales wizard
description: Verifies that a user can complete the cash sale workflow and see the new sale in the recent sales list.

steps.description: Fill in the username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Verify a new sale appears in the recent sales list
Verify the sale is recorded as completed

title: Reject an empty organization name during onboarding
description: The onboarding flow prevents completion when the organization name is missing and shows a validation error.

steps.description: Fill in the login field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Attempt to complete the onboarding wizard
Verify an organization name validation error is visible

title: Add a customer to CRM
description: A user can create a customer record and see it appear in the customer list.

steps.description: Fill in the login field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Fill in the first name field with a valid first name
Fill in the last name field with a valid last name
Fill in the phone field with a valid phone number
Fill in the email field with a valid email address
Verify the new customer appears in the customer list

title: Save the organization currency setting
description: An authenticated user can change the organization currency in general settings and see the updated currency reflected in the app.

steps.description: Verify the updated currency setting is saved
Verify the new currency is reflected in the app

title: Create a lead from the pipeline board
description: Verifies that a user can create a lead by selecting a customer, vehicle, source, and stage and then see it appear in the chosen pipeline column.

steps.description: Fill in the username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Verify a new lead card is displayed
Verify the lead appears in the selected stage column

title: Edit a vehicle and keep the updated details in inventory
description: An inventory user can update an existing vehicle and see the edited record reflected in the list.

steps.description: Fill in the login field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Open an existing vehicle for editing
Verify the updated vehicle is displayed in the inventory list

title: Record an expense and see it in the list
description: Verifies that a user can create an operational expense and see it appear in the expenses list.

steps.description: Fill in the username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Fill in a valid date for the expense
Verify the new expense appears in the list

title: Delete a vehicle from inventory
description: An inventory user can remove an existing vehicle and no longer see it in the inventory list.

steps.description: Fill in the login field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Open an existing vehicle for removal
Verify the vehicle is removed from the inventory list

title: Search customers in CRM
description: A user can search the customer list and see matching customer records.

steps.description: Fill in the login field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Fill in the customer search field with a known customer name or phone
Verify matching customer records are displayed

title: Move a lead to another stage
description: Verifies that a user can reopen an existing lead, change its stage, and see it move to a different pipeline column.

steps.description: Fill in the username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Verify the lead card is visible in a different stage column
Verify the lead no longer appears in the previous stage column

title: Approve a pending below-minimum-profit deal
description: A manager can review a pending approval and approve it so the request is removed from the queue.

steps.description: Verify pending approval cards are displayed
Click the approve action for a pending approval
Verify the approved request is no longer shown in the list

title: Edit a customer record
description: A user can update an existing customer and see the edited customer in the list.

steps.description: Fill in the login field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Open an existing customer for editing
Verify the updated customer is displayed in the customer list

title: View filtered report metrics
description: Verifies that a user can choose a date range in reports and see summary metrics and salesperson performance for that period.

steps.description: Fill in the login credentials with {{LOGIN_USER}} and {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Verify salesperson performance breakdown is displayed

title: Complete the cash sale review step before confirmation
description: Verifies that the sale wizard presents a summary before final submission and only completes after confirmation.

steps.description: Fill in the username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Verify the sale summary is displayed
Verify the sale is not yet completed

title: Reject a pending below-minimum-profit deal
description: A manager can review a pending approval and reject it so the request is removed from the queue.

steps.description: Verify pending approval cards are displayed
Click the reject action for a pending approval
Verify the rejected request is no longer shown in the list

title: Delete a customer from CRM
description: A user can remove a customer record and no longer see it in the customer list.

steps.description: Fill in the login field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Open an existing customer for removal
Verify the customer is removed from the customer list

title: View the lead pipeline board
description: Verifies that a signed-in user can open the leads page and see leads grouped by pipeline stage.

steps.description: Fill in the username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Verify leads are grouped into pipeline columns

title: Update VAT in general settings
description: An authenticated user can enter a VAT rate in general settings and save it successfully.

steps.description: Verify the VAT setting is saved
Verify the updated VAT value is displayed

title: Seed default pipeline stages
description: Verifies that a user can initialize the pipeline with default stages and see them appear in the configuration list.

steps.description: Fill in the login credentials with {{LOGIN_USER}} and {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Verify the pipeline stages are displayed

title: Show validation when a vehicle is saved without required details
description: The vehicle form prevents saving when required information is missing and shows validation feedback.

steps.description: Fill in the login field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Attempt to save the vehicle without filling required details
Verify a vehicle validation error is visible

title: Filter expenses by title or category
description: Verifies that a user can search expenses and see matching records in the results list.

steps.description: Fill in the username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Search expenses by title or category
Verify matching expense records are displayed
Verify non-matching expense records are hidden

description: Verifies that a user can create a custom field for vehicles and see it available in the vehicle configuration.

steps.description: Fill in the login credentials with {{LOGIN_USER}} and {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Verify the new vehicle custom field is displayed

title: Review approval details before deciding
description: A manager can inspect the salesperson, vehicle, and profit thresholds on a pending approval before taking action.

steps.description: Verify pending approval details are displayed
Verify requested profit and minimum allowed profit are displayed

title: Update lead details
description: Verifies that a user can edit an existing lead and see the updated lead information after saving.

steps.description: Fill in the username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Verify the updated lead information is displayed
Verify the lead edit is reflected on the board

steps.description: Fill in the login credentials with {{LOGIN_USER}} and {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Verify the revised pipeline stage settings are displayed

steps.description: Fill in the login field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Attempt to save the customer without filling required details

steps.description: Fill in the username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Verify the expense is removed from the list

steps.description: Fill in the login credentials with {{LOGIN_USER}} and {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Verify the pipeline stages reflect the new order

steps.description: Fill in the login credentials with {{LOGIN_USER}} and {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Verify the new customer custom field is displayed

steps.description: Fill in the login credentials with {{LOGIN_USER}} and {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}

Save the lead without completing required fields
